name: Pomodoro Timer
description: A focused study timer built on the Pomodoro technique, with Kinship branding — projector-ready for classroom display.
prompt: Create a prototype for me that is a pomodoro timer. I will show this to students on a projector.
full_prompt: Create a prototype for me that is a pomodoro timer. See the image for inspiration. I will show this students on a projector
what_made_it_special: Projector-ready for classroom use — large digits readable from the back of a room. Kinship-branded with deep-ink purple for focus mode, shifting to green for short breaks and blue for long breaks. Bell sound cue on completion.
design_decisions: Kinship ink-purple (#3D1A4E) background for focus mode, cream digits — matching classroom display context
Large 100px font digits for projector readability from the back of the room
Three modes: Pomodoro (25 min), Short Break (5 min), Long Break (15 min) — color background transitions per mode
Kinship logo mark + wordmark in the top-left corner (white on purple)
SVG circular progress ring that depletes as time counts down
Web Audio API bell sound (C5-E5-G5-C6 chord arpeggio) on session completion
Originally inspired by a reference image Azim shared; revised to Kinship brand colors
tech_notes: Built as app/pomodoro-timer/page.tsx — fully static client component (no backend)
Framer Motion AnimatePresence for digit flip animations and mode-switch color transitions
Web Audio API for completion bell — no external sound files needed
useInterval pattern for accurate countdown without drift

slack_thread.name: Azim
slack_thread.content: Create a prototype for me that is a pomodoro timer. See the image for inspiration. I will show this students on a projector

slack_thread.name: Hermes
slack_thread.content: Built and deployed. The timer uses Kinship ink-purple for focus sessions, shifting to green for short breaks and blue for long breaks. Large digits (100px) are readable from the back of a classroom. A bell chord plays on session completion. Kinship logo mark is in the top-left corner.
